question:
Numpuses are not mean. Numpuses are impuses. Every impus is not fruity. Impuses are zumpuses. Each zumpus is small. Zumpuses are tumpuses. Every tumpus is transparent. Each tumpus is a jompus. Wumpuses are not orange. Each jompus is not bright. Jompuses are dumpuses. Dumpuses are orange. Each dumpus is a vumpus. Every vumpus is sweet. Vumpuses are yumpuses. Yumpuses are wooden. Every yumpus is a rompus. Sam is an impus.

Is the following statement true or false? Sam is orange.
